name: mormot2-superpowers
description: Pascal/Delphi+FPC variant of Superpowers, specialized for the Synopse mORMot 2 framework: ORM, REST, SOA, networking, deployment, auth, TSynTestCase TDD.

interface.shortDescription: Pascal/Delphi+FPC + mORMot 2 development methodology and skills.
interface.longDescription: Pascal/Delphi+FPC variant of the Superpowers methodology, specialized for the Synopse mORMot 2 framework. Covers TOrm/TOrmModel, REST/SOA, async networking, database providers, deployment topologies, JWT/ECC/AES crypto, and TSynTestCase test-driven development. Cross-platform (Delphi + FPC + Lazarus).
defaultPrompt: I want to build a mORMot 2 REST service.
Add a TOrm class for users with email and role fields.
